_comment: execute-improvement-plan M3.1 + M5 anchor hook manifest. Includes static base hooks (contract-via-cli / upstream-readonly / gate-pass) and the 4 dynamic stop_if hooks (changes_outside_authorized / new_external_dependency / design_constraint_conflict / new_public_behavior_without_delta_spec). The dynamic hooks read effective-overlay.json produced by `harness execute apply-overlay`.

hooks.purpose: Block mutation of upstream execution-brief.md / execution-brief.contract.yaml.
Block `harness mission stage complete execute` until last_gate_run_status=PASS.
Deny Edit/Write whose file_path is outside the current Atomic Task's authorized_paths.
Deny Edit/Write to project dependency files (per dependency-files.yaml) when stop_if active.
Deny Edit/Write hitting prohibited_paths from upstream design constraints.
Advisory or strict block when new public behavior lacks delta spec coverage.
